mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE role = 'USER'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE role = 'USER' AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM ( SELECT user_id FROM post WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() UNION SELECT user_id FROM comment WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() UNION SELECT user_id FROM interaction WHERE type = 1 AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() ) AS active_users
SELECT DATE(create_time) as date, COUNT(*) as value FROM sys_user WHERE role = 'USER' AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN IFNULL(credit_score, 100) BETWEEN 0 AND 20 THEN '0-20' WHEN IFNULL(credit_score, 100) BETWEEN 21 AND 40 THEN '21-40' WHEN IFNULL(credit_score, 100) BETWEEN 41 AND 60 THEN '41-60' WHEN IFNULL(credit_score, 100) BETWEEN 61 AND 80 THEN '61-80' ELSE '81-100' END as segment, COUNT(*) as count FROM sys_user WHERE role = 'USER' GROUP BY segment ORDER BY segment
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interaction WHERE type = 1 AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()) AS total
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE DATE(create_time) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE DATE(create_time) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interaction WHERE type = 1 AND DATE(create_time) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)) AS total

SELECT u.id as userId, u.nickname, u.avatar, IFNULL(SUM(p.like_count), 0) as value FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN post p ON u.id = p.user_id AND p.status = 1 WHERE u.role = 'USER' GROUP BY u.id, u.nickname, u.avatar ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT u.id as userId, u.nickname, u.avatar, COUNT(r.id) as value FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_report r ON u.id = r.user_id AND r.status = 1 WHERE u.role = 'USER' GROUP BY u.id, u.nickname, u.avatar ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT u.id as userId, u.nickname, u.avatar, COUNT(c.id) as value FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN comment c ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE u.role = 'USER' GROUP BY u.id, u.nickname, u.avatar ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE status IN (1, 2) AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE status = 1 AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT word, COUNT(*) as count FROM sensitive_word_log WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY word ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_report WHERE status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_report WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_report WHERE status != 0
SELECT reason as type, COUNT(*) as count FROM sys_report GROUP BY reason ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT post_id as postId, COUNT(*) as reportCount FROM sys_report WHERE post_id IS NOT NULL AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{minutes} MINUTE) GROUP BY post_id HAVING COUNT(*) > #{threshold}
SELECT user_id as userId, COUNT(*) as postCount FROM post WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{minutes} MINUTE) GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(*) > #{threshold}
SELECT HOUR(create_time) as hour, COUNT(*) as count FROM post WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() GROUP BY HOUR(create_time) ORDER BY hour
SELECT HOUR(create_time) as hour, COUNT(*) as count FROM comment WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() GROUP BY HOUR(create_time) ORDER BY hour
SELECT id, content FROM post WHERE status = 1 AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE status = 1 AND DATE(create_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE DATE(create_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interaction WHERE type = 1 AND DATE(create_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}) AS total
